items.name: Any Excuse for a Food Fight

description.value:
Trigger Ilza attacks the PCs

Effect Upon seeing Ilza's anger, the guests rise up in a flurry of activity, their voices suddenly loud and startling. Every PC in area D6 must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:24|options:area-effect,inflicts:off-guard] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] for the first round of combat. The haunt then rolls initiative.

details.description: Phantasmal diners begin hurling phantom food and very real, sharp cutlery in a dangerous food fight that targets intruders.
details.disable: @Check[intimidation|dc:25] (trained) to threaten the ghostly guests into submission or @Check[religion|dc:28] (expert) to exorcise the haunt; two successes are required to disable it.

publication.title: Pathfinder Adventure Path: Bastion of Blasphemies

details.reset: The haunt deactivates at the start of any round in which Ilza is the only other creature present, then immediately resets.
details.routine: (1 action) On the haunt's initiative, the phantoms hurl ghostly food and real silverware through the room. All creatures other than Ilza who are in the area take @Damage[(2d8+9)[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic|options:area-effect] save) from the sharp forks and knives being thrown about.
